purpose: Public recovery manifest for the V03.1 sync-to-code patch cleanup. Local file-copy payloads are intentionally not published because they can preserve machine-specific provenance.

public_payload_policy.reason: Full local recovery folders were omitted from the public package to avoid publishing local paths, private audit provenance, and duplicated working-tree content.
public_payload_policy.recovery_source: Use the repository commit history and the files listed in this manifest.

notes: The source builder-team-qc folder was a local working folder, so no source HEAD baseline is published.
Git baselines come from the everythingcodex mirror HEAD before the working-tree patch.
The corrected version-record file was new/untracked in the mirror baseline, so a git baseline may be unavailable for that file.
